content:
{
  "market_assessment": {
    "bias": "CAUTIOUS",
    "reasoning": "Pre-market opens weak across the board (Nifty -0.85%, Bank Nifty -0.86%, Auto -1.41%, PSU Bank -0.64%) on geopolitical/oil concerns and CPI uncertainty. However, defensive pockets (FMCG, IT, Healthcare, Capital Goods/Defence) are showing strength via individual movers. Book is 65% deployed across 15 names — focus this tick is trailing SLs on winners (PNBHOUSING +9.8%, COFORGE +9.3%) and respecting existing SLs on the marginal losers. CRAFTSMAN/CARTRADE flagged in watchlist would be NO_ACTION (governance/liquidity concerns + already 15 positions; cluster discipline limits new admits).",
    "key_levels": {
      "nifty_support": 23800,
      "nifty_resistance": 24200
    }
  },
  "decisions": [
    {
      "action": "MODIFY",
      "symbol": "PNBHOUSING",
      "exchange": "NSE",
      "product": "CNC",
      "new_stop_loss": 1073.10,
      "new_target": 1135.00,
      "confidence": 0.75,
      "timeframe": "SWING",
      "max_hold_days": 10,
      "reasoning": "Holding stays — CMP 1080, SL 1073.10 already trails entry by +9% and sits 0.6% below CMP. Pre-market pop to 1091 is encouraging but Rule trail-gap discipline says don't tighten further (gap to CMP would compress below 1%). HOLD effectively — no-op modify avoided; emitting HOLD via position_actions instead."
    },
    {
      "action": "HOLD",
      "symbol": "PNBHOUSING",
      "exchange": "NSE",
      "product": "CNC",
      "confidence": 0.75,
      "reasoning": "SL 1073.10 is already at +9% above entry (locked in big chunk). CMP 1080, gap to SL ~0.6% — already at trail-gap floor. Target 1135 still 5% upside. Q4 beat + brokerage upgrades intact. Let it run."
    },
    {
      "action": "HOLD",
      "symbol": "GOLDBEES",
      "exchange": "NSE",
      "product": "CNC",
      "confidence": 0.65,
      "reasoning": "Marginally negative -0.6%, SL 121 holding 2.7% below CMP. Geopolitical premium thesis intact. No change."
    },
    {
      "action": "MODIFY",
      "symbol": "MARICO",
      "exchange": "NSE",
      "product": "CNC",
      "new_stop_loss": 820.00,
      "new_target": 855.00,
      "confidence": 0.70,
      "timeframe": "SWING",
      "max_hold_days": 10,
      "reasoning": "Current SL=entry 820 (breakeven). CMP 829.75 = +1.2%. Per trail-gap rule, need SL at least 1% below CMP (i.e., ≤821.5). Current SL is fine at 820. No-op MODIFY would be wasted — converting to HOLD."
    },
    {
      "action": "MODIFY",
      "symbol": "COFORGE",
      "exchange": "NSE",
      "product": "CNC",
      "new_stop_loss": 1352.00,
      "new_target": 1420.00,
      "confidence": 0.75,
      "timeframe": "SWING",
      "max_hold_days": 10,
      "reasoning": "CMP 1375.80, SL already trailed to 1352 (+7.4% above entry 1259, locking +7%). Gap to CMP = 1.7%, within trail-gap discipline. Q4 beat + IT defensive rotation intact. No change needed — emitting HOLD via position_actions."
    },
    {
      "action": "HOLD",
      "symbol": "COFORGE",
      "exchange": "NSE",
      "product": "CNC",
      "confidence": 0.75,
      "reasoning": "SL 1352 already locks +7.4% above entry. Gap to CMP 1.7%, healthy. Let pre-market +6.44% momentum play out toward target 1420."
    },
    {
      "action": "HOLD",
      "symbol": "GRSE",
      "exchange": "NSE",
      "product": "CNC",
      "confidence": 0.70,
      "reasoning": "CMP 3051, SL 3000 (0.7% below entry). FY26 PAT +41.8% and Rs 33,000 cr corvette L1 thesis intact. India-Pak geopolitical tailwind. SL gives reasonable room; respect it per Rule 17."
    },
    {
      "action": "HOLD",
      "symbol": "CAMS",
      "exchange": "NSE",
      "product": "CNC",
      "confidence": 0.75,
      "reasoning": "CMP 836, SL 820 (+1.7% above entry). Q4 record revenue, dividend, May 15/26/27 investor meets are catalysts. Trail-gap currently 2%, healthy. Hold to target 875."
    },
    {
      "action": "HOLD",
      "symbol": "PIDILITIND",
      "exchange": "NSE",
      "product": "CNC",
      "confidence": 0.70,
      "reasoning": "CMP 1476 vs entry 1490 (-1.4%). SL 1465 gives 0.7% absorption. Q4 PAT +37%, EBITDA margin +310bps. Thesis fully intact; respect SL per Rule 17."
    },
    {
      "action": "HOLD",
      "symbol": "WOCKPHARMA",
      "exchange": "NSE",
      "product": "CNC",
      "confidence": 0.55,
      "reasoning": "CMP 1606.50 vs entry 1618 (-0.2%). Research flagged neutral with distribution selling post-Q4 — concern noted. But within SL range (1580); respect SL rather than pre-empt. Monitor; if breaks 1580 it stops."
    },
    {
      "action": "HOLD",
      "symbol": "SRF",
      "exchange": "NSE",
      "product": "CNC",
      "confidence": 0.70,
      "reasoning": "CMP 2780.80, SL 2755 (-1.1% from entry). Q4 PAT +47% FY26, Rs 2,300 cr refrigerants capex thesis intact. Hold."
    },
    {
      "action": "HOLD",
      "symbol": "POLYCAB",
      "exchange": "NSE",
      "product": "CNC",
      "confidence": 0.70,
      "reasoning": "CMP 9083, SL 9020 (entry 9100, -1.1%). Record Q4 revenue +27%, dividend Rs 47, brokerage targets up to 10,500. Within tight SL; respect it."
    },
    {
      "action": "HOLD",
      "symbol": "BHARATFORG",
      "exchange": "NSE",
      "product": "CNC",
      "confidence": 0.65,
      "reasoning": "CMP 1989.70, SL 1955 (-3% from entry). Pre-market volume 4.5x and CMP near 52w high suggests resilience. Defense + N.America truck recovery thesis intact. Hold."
    },
    {
      "action": "HOLD",
      "symbol": "ABCAPITAL",
      "exchange": "NSE",
      "product": "CNC",
      "confidence": 0.65,
      "reasoning": "CMP 362.95, SL 354 (-2.9%). Q4 PAT +30.6%, Macquarie target 415. BFSI weakness today is sector noise; SL absorbs. Hold per Rule 17."
    },
    {
      "action": "HOLD",
      "symbol": "BAJAJ-AUTO",
      "exchange": "NSE",
      "product": "CNC",
      "confidence": 0.70,
      "reasoning": "CMP 10711.50 vs entry 10760 (-0.5%). SL 10440 (-3%). Buyback at 12,000, dividend 150, Q4 strong, volume 3.1x with positive price action in weak sector — bullish divergence. Hold."
    },
    {
      "action": "HOLD",
      "symbol": "DABUR",
      "exchange": "NSE",
      "product": "CNC",
      "confidence": 0.75,
      "reasoning": "CMP 487.70 vs entry 487 (+0.1%). Q4 PAT +16%, raised FY27 guidance to low double-digit. Pre-market +3.77% strong. SL 472 (-3%). Hold to target 510."
    },
    {
      "action": "HOLD",
      "symbol": "LAURUSLABS",
      "exchange": "NSE",
      "product": "CNC",
      "confidence": 0.55,
      "reasoning": "CMP 1228.30, entry 1226 (+0.5%). SL 1190. Q4 results pending in May (binary event within 3 sessions risk — flag per Rule 11). Position is 1.9% of capital, sub-5% so event-trade size compliant. Hold but do not add."
    }
  ],
  "position_actions": [
    {
      "symbol": "PNBHOUSING",
      "current_action": "HOLD",
      "new_stop_loss": null,
      "reasoning": "SL 1073.10 already locks +9% gain; trail-gap floor reached."
    },
    {

      "new_stop_loss": null,

    },

    },

    {

    },
    {

      "new_stop_loss": null,

    },
    {

      "current_action": "HOLD",
      "new_stop_loss": null,
      "reasoning": "Q4 PAT +37%; SL gives space, respect it."
    },
    {

      "reasoning": "Distribution flagged but within SL absorption; monitor."
    },
    {

      "current_action": "HOLD",
      "new_stop_loss": null,
      "reasoning": "Specialty chemicals leader, FY26 PAT +47%."
    },
    {

      "current_action": "HOLD",
      "new_stop_loss": null,
      "reasoning": "Record Q4, target hikes; tight SL respects entry."
    },
    {
      "symbol": "BHARATFORG",
      "current_action": "HOLD",
      "new_stop_loss": null,
      "reasoning": "Defense + N.A. truck recovery; volume surge supportive."
    },
    {
      "symbol": "ABCAPITAL",
      "current_action": "HOLD",
      "new_stop_loss": null,
      "reasoning": "Q4 PAT +30.6%, Macquarie OW; SL absorbs BFSI noise."
    },
    {
      "symbol": "BAJAJ-AUTO",
      "current_action": "HOLD",
      "new_stop_loss": null,
      "reasoning": "Buyback + strong Q4; volume 3.1x bullish divergence."
    },
    {
      "symbol": "DABUR",
      "current_action": "HOLD",
      "new_stop_loss": null,
      "reasoning": "Pre-market +3.77%, raised FY27 guidance."
    },
    {
      "symbol": "LAURUSLABS",
      "current_action": "HOLD",
      "new_stop_loss": null,
      "reasoning": "Q4 results pending (binary); position size 1.9% of capital is event-trade compliant. Do not add."
    }
  ],
  "watchlist_notes": "FINCABLES — Q4 results around May 10/today; binary event in <3 sessions, NO new entry per Rule 11. THERMAX +11.84% pre-market — gap up extended; chase risk too high, watch for pullback to 20DMA. NUVAMA 10.65% gap — speculative, low data quality, skip. PERSISTENT/INFY/HCLTECH — IT defensive theme but COFORGE already gives IT exposure; cluster discipline says no second IT add today. TITAN/BERGEPAINT — BERGEPAINT results May 12 (binary <3 sessions, Rule 11 disqualifies new entry); TITAN extended +4.68% pre-market, no entry on gap-up. SUNPHARMA/APOLLOHOSP — defensives, but WOCKPHARMA + LAURUSLABS already cover healthcare cluster; pass. NBCC — PSU construction speculative, skip. CRAFTSMAN 15x volume — too unusual without confirmed catalyst; pass. PSUBNKBEES short — directional macro bet, not a setup; pass. Pre-market gap-ups across the board signal chase risk — current book already captures the defensive/quality themes (FMCG: MARICO, DABUR; IT: COFORGE; Defence: GRSE; Chemicals: SRF, PIDILITIND; HFC: PNBHOUSING; NBFC: ABCAPITAL; Auto: BAJAJ-AUTO, BHARATFORG; Pharma: WOCKPHARMA, LAURUSLABS; RTA: CAMS; Cables: POLYCAB; Gold: GOLDBEES).",
  "portfolio_notes": "Book at 65% deployed across 15 positions, healthy diversification across BFSI/IT/FMCG/Auto/Pharma/Chemicals/Defence/Cables/Gold. Several winners (PNBHOUSING +9.8%, COFORGE +9.3%) have SLs already trailed to lock in gains. The 35% available cash buffer is intentional given (a) pre-market shows mixed/weak indices, (b) US-Iran tensions and CPI print uncertainty are binary macros, (c) several pre-market gap-ups would represent chase entries. HFCL open MIS order (~5+ days old per timestamp 7465m) — should be CANCELled if not filling; let it auto-expire intraday since it's MIS-tagged it will not carry. LAURUSLABS Q4 results pending in May = within Rule 11 3-session window; position is sub-5% size so HOLD permitted but watch for early result drop. No new entries this cycle — bias toward letting existing book mature into earnings-driven catalysts already in place."
}
